title: [track_10min_16mb] utkuaydiin 10L Muon — 15.46 MB
body:
Pure modeling track submission.

- 10 layers, 448 dim, BigramHash(8192) + SmearGate
- Muon optimizer + SWA + 5.5% global prune + mixed Int5/Int6 PTQ
- Trained 10 min on 8×H100 with real FineWeb data
- Final artifact: 15.46 MB after zstd-22
